comments.body:
## Description

Create plugins/dso/docs/contracts/scrutiny-pending-tag.md defining the tag contract:

- Tag field name: scrutiny:pending
- Allowed values: present (tag exists on ticket) or absent (tag not present)
- Semantics: When present, the epic has NOT been through the scrutiny pipeline. Downstream skills (preplanning, implementation-plan) should halt and direct the practitioner to run /dso:brainstorm first.
- Writer: /roadmap (writes on opt-out)
- Readers: /preplanning, /implementation-plan (check on entry)
- Default-deny note: Missing tag should be treated as 'pending' (not 'reviewed') per epic SC4 scenario analysis mitigation

This is a scaffolding commit — the contract document is inert until roadmap writes the tag (Task 3) and downstream skills read it (Story 3193-3b53).

## File Impact
- CREATE: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/scrutiny-pending-tag.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Contract file exists and is non-empty
  Verify: test -s $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/scrutiny-pending-tag.md
- [ ] Contract defines tag field name
  Verify: grep -qi 'scrutiny:pending' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/scrutiny-pending-tag.md
- [ ] Contract defines writer and readers
  Verify: grep -qi 'writer\|reader' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/scrutiny-pending-tag.md
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — AC tests pass: contract file exists (PASS), contract completeness (PASS). 3 failing tests in test-roadmap-scrutiny-opt-in.sh are for roadmap SKILL.md changes (separate tasks, not this ticket's scope).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: scrutiny:pending tag contract document created
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
